name: Single Rail Wall Shelf - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Save space while adding an extra storage option to your baby's nursery with the Single-Rail Wall Shelf from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made with rubberwood in a lacquered finish, this wall shelf features a rectangular plank with a wooden rail for a touch of decorative style. The single shelf provides the perfect base for framed photos, soft toys and more. You can install it in nursery or mount it in your hallway to add a touch of functional style.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
